transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Riverbend Health Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Nolan. It's currently on the 14th.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up the appointment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Sandra. I see your appointment with Dr. Nolan on the 14th at 10 AM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could I move it to the following Monday, maybe in the afternoon?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check. I have Monday the 20th at 1:30 PM available. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've moved your appointment to Monday the 20th at 1:30 PM with Dr. Nolan. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Sandra. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Have a good day.
